blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,427 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 18.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 54" over the past week. Current depth: 95".
